title: Finite Graph Coloring Witnesses

solver_reuse.target: graph coloring triangle two-color QF_BV/DRAT regression seed
solver_reuse.pressure: One-bit triangle coloring conflict where all three vertex colors must be pairwise distinct inside a 1-bit domain.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional finite graph-coloring rows only when they add distinct Bool/CNF or fixed-width BV solver pressure; keep chromatic-number theorems and infinite graph claims in the Lean-horizon lane.

graduation_criteria: Encode finite graph coloring constraints as deterministic Bool/CNF and fixed-width BV formulas.
Replay SAT color assignments through Axeyum model evaluation.
Produce and check LRAT/DRAT evidence for non-colorability examples.
Keep the resource-backed triangle non-2-colorability CNF regression checking generated DRAT and elaborated LRAT proofs.
Keep the resource-backed triangle non-2-colorability QF_BV regression checking generated DRAT proof for the one-bit color encoding.
Promote graph helpers into a reusable example-pack utility only after reachability or matching packs need them.
